parameters.jsCode: const products=[{n:'Peptide Anti-Aging Serum',c:'firmer-looking skin and softer fine lines, 2% Hexapeptide-11 + Ginkgo Biloba, for normal to dry skin'},{n:'Retinol Alternative Serum',c:'plant-based retinol alternative with 2% Bidens Pilosa, refines texture and softens fine lines without irritation'},{n:'Sensitive Moisturizing Cream',c:'soothes and strengthens sensitive skin, fragrance-free'},{n:'Radiant Glow Cleanser',c:'gentle daily cleanse that lifts impurities for radiant skin'},{n:'Purifying Toner',c:'clears pores and balances oily and combination skin, fragrance-free'},{n:'Sensitive Scalp Shampoo',c:'soothing, dermatologically tested, for all hair types'}];const wk=Math.floor(Date.now()/6048e5);const p=products[wk%products.length];const prompt='You are the email copywriter for Elira Living, a vegan, ECOCERT COSMOS Natural, cruelty-free skincare brand made in the EU (sells to Germany and the Netherlands). Voice: calm, reassuring, proof over adjectives. EU cosmetics-claims compliant: use only the substantiated claims given, no medical or exaggerated claims. Write a SHORT newsletter featuring the '+p.n+' ('+p.c+'). Provide three language versions labelled EN:, DE:, NL:. Each version = one subject line, two short paragraphs, and a clear call to action to shop at eliraliving.com. Keep it concise.';const orBody=JSON.stringify({model:'google/gemini-2.5-flash',max_tokens:900,messages:[{role:'user',content:prompt}]});return [{json:{product:p.n,orBody:orBody}}];
